resources.string: Already have an account? Sign In
Password reset email sent. Please check your inbox.
Password must be at least 6 characters.
Could not send password reset email.
Email and password cannot be empty.
Are you sure you want to sign out?
How would you like to add your photo?
Your email address is not verified.
Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
Do not pull straight to chest! Arc back toward your hip.
Don\'t just pull up, push away like touching the walls
Don\'t drop too low to avoid shoulder pinching
Let arm hang fully at bottom to stretch back
Leg is too close to the floor
Head too high, look right between your hands
Don\'t use back momentum, stand tall
Don\'t bend wrists, keep forearm vertical
Don\'t bend neck back, look at your mat
Go deeper, chest closer to ground
Elbows must be right under shoulders
Don\'t bend knees, squeeze core and glutes
Pull dumbbell up to your shoulder
Feel the stretch and lower slowly...
Keep torso more parallel to floor, avoid upright stress
Don\'t look at chest or feet, keep neck straight
Don\'t raise hips too high, keep body straight
Don\'t raise hips, stay in a straight line
Don\'t break neck to look up, keep it neutral
Don\'t lock out elbows, keep slight bend
Open arms slightly forward, 20-30 degrees (Scapular plane)
Open from shoulder, don\'t bend elbows much
Pinky slightly up, palms facing down
Don\'t pour pitcher motion with wrist, might pinch shoulder
Not squeezing back fully, pull elbow harder to ceiling
Poor tracking — stay fully in camera
Lean forward and keep back flat
Mostly sitting during the day, no regular exercise
Regular movement, light exercise 1-3 days a week
Active lifestyle, intense exercise 4-7 days a week
Please fill in your weight in profile to calculate calories.
No new groups to discover right now.
No groups to discover right now.
You are not in a group yet.
You are not in a group yet.\nCreate a new group or join one.
Are you sure you want to remove \"%1$s\" from the group?
Please verify your email address. Some features may be restricted.
Are you sure you want to close this group? This will permanently delete all members, invites, requests, messages and programs.
Are you sure you want to leave this group?
Members can change the cover photo.
Only admin can change the photo.
How would you like to update your group cover photo?
If you start working with a new expert, your current expert connection will be cut and active tasks will be removed.
If you unlink from your expert, your active tasks will be removed. Completed history remains.
Do you want to remove this completed task from your history? The expert record is not affected.
Your email address has been verified successfully!
This task is not active today.
Are you sure you want to delete this group program from your home page?
Are you sure you want to remove this patient from your list?
You must add a patient first.
No tasks found for selected criteria.
Are you sure you want to completely delete the task \'%1$s\'? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete the exercise \'%1$s\' from this task?
No calorie data found between these dates.
No performance data found between these dates.
Exercise-based performance and form score averages
Detailed analysis data is not ready yet.
Camera access is needed for real-time exercise form analysis.
General system performance and user distribution
Are you sure you want to delete the group \'%1$s\'? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to %2$s %1$s?
Are you sure you want to make %1$s the new SOLE ADMIN of the group? The old admin will be demoted to member.
You must add at least 1 exercise.
All targets (Reps/Duration) must be greater than 0.
Sets count must be greater than 0.
You must select at least one day for custom days.
Select role for your Google account
This choice is required to create your profile.
Exercise details could not be read
This task is no longer active.
Are you sure you want to completely delete this badge from the system? This action cannot be undone.
Enter the email address of the person you want to invite to %1$s.
Camera permission denied. Permission is needed to take a photo.
